comments.comment: Increase in number of small motors and pumps used to ventilate and dewater the underground mine that started production in early 2010.

The error message for phenanthrene stated that there had been a program change since last year. Our records show that phenanthrene was submitted as an air release, only. This is what I have submitted this year. There was lees than a 10% difference in repo

Last year, Tailings and Waste Rock reporting was in a different system than the regular NPRI report (Owners I vs Owners II). This year they are in the same report so the substances needed to be added.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Changes in estimation method: previous submissions used an estimation method that focused on the total historic rock pile value that was updating as a rolling number annually. This approach has been updated to reflect a single annual value representing the current NPRI year. Diavik has updated the 2020-2024 reports to reflect this change.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
Changes in estimation method: previous submissions used an estimation method that focused on the total historic rock pile value that was updating as a rolling number annually. This approach has been updated to reflect a single annual value representing the current NPRI year. Diavik has updated the 2020-2024 reports to reflect this change.

Reason for changes in releases from previous year after making the aforementioned change: decrease in diesel usage and km driven at site

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
Changes in estimation method: previous submissions used an estimation method that focused on the total historic rock pile value that was updating as a rolling number annually. This approach has been updated to reflect a single annual value representing the current NPRI year. Diavik has updated the 2020-2024 reports to reflect this change.
---
Reason for changes in releases from previous year after making the aforementioned change: All other non point = increased fuel usage in 2020.  Road Dust = decrease in km driven and increased days frozen/wet roads.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
Changes in estimation method: previous submissions used an estimation method that focused on the total historic rock pile value that was updating as a rolling number annually. This approach has been updated to reflect a single annual value representing the current NPRI year. Diavik has updated the 2020-2024 reports to reflect this change.

Reason for changes in releases from previous year after making the aforementioned change: decrease in diesel usage and km driven at site.

type.fr: Nature des autres rejets non ponctuels
